title: MCP Code Tools for file linking, pushing, syncing, and reviewing code snippets
purpose: Provides tools for managing code files as linked snippet envelopes, enabling linking, pushing, syncing, reviewing edits, and listing code files.
module_context: Exports constants for API configuration, URL building, and language mapping. Defines schemas for all tool parameters and exports async handler functions for each tool operation.

methods.name: buildUrl
methods.normalized_params: (path: string, project: string, session: string, extraParams?: Record<string, string>): string

steps.content: Construct a base URL using the provided path and API base URL.
Set the project parameter in the URL search string.
Set the session parameter in the URL search string.
IF extra parameters are provided, add them to the URL search string.
Return the fully constructed URL string.

methods.name: handleLinkCodeFile
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, filePath: string, name?: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; id: string }>

steps.content: Validate and resolve the file path under the project root.
Get file statistics and check if the file size exceeds 1MB.
IF the file is too large, throw an error.
Check if the file is binary.
IF the file is binary, throw an error.
Read the file content as UTF-8 text.
Determine the language based on the file extension.
Create a snippet envelope with the file content and metadata.
Send a POST request to the API to create the snippet.
IF the API request fails, throw an error with the response message.
Parse the API response and return the success status and snippet ID.

methods.name: handlePushCodeToFile
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; filePath: string; bytesWritten: number }>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API to push code to the file.
IF the API request fails, throw an error with the response message.
Parse the API response and return the success status, file path, and bytes written.

methods.name: handleSyncCodeFromDisk
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; diskChanged: boolean; hasLocalEdits: boolean; conflict: boolean }>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API to sync code from disk.
IF the API request fails, throw an error with the response message.
Parse the API response and return the sync results.

methods.name: handleReviewCodeEdits
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, format?: 'diff' | 'full'): Promise<Record<string, unknown>>

steps.content: Send a GET request to the API to retrieve the snippet.
IF the API request fails, throw an error indicating the snippet was not found.
Parse the snippet content as JSON to get the envelope.
IF the format is 'diff', generate a unified diff patch.
ELSE return the full envelope content.

methods.name: handleProposeCodeEdit
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, newCode: string, message?: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API to propose a code edit.
IF the API request fails, throw an error with the response message.
Parse the API response and return the result.

methods.name: handleListCodeFiles
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<{ files: Array<{ id: string; name: string; filePath: string; language: string; dirty: boolean; lastPushedAt: string | null }> }>

steps.content: Send a GET request to the API to list snippets.
IF the API request fails, throw an error with the response message.
Parse the API response to get the list of snippets.
Iterate through each snippet and attempt to parse its content as JSON.
IF the snippet is a linked file, extract and include its metadata in the result.
Return the list of linked files with their metadata.
